info.title: AgentCallback Public API
info.description:
Public, customer-callable AgentCallback APIs for calls, voice agents, campaigns, phone numbers, and voices.

**API keys:** Sign in to your AgentCallback account and open **Dashboard > API Keys** to create an API key. Send the key with every request using the `x-api-key` header.

tags.name: Calls
tags.description: Create calls and retrieve call results.

tags.name: Voice Agents
tags.description: Create and manage voice agent scripts.

tags.name: Campaigns
tags.description: Create and manage batch call campaigns.

tags.name: Voices
tags.description: Browse voices and fetch voice previews.

apiKeyAuth.name: x-api-key
apiKeyAuth.description: Create and manage API keys in your AgentCallback account under Dashboard > API Keys.

oneOf.description: JSON-encoded contact array for workflow integrations.

useCase.description: Voice agent use case or script identifier used for standalone calls.

fromPhoneNumber.description: Outbound caller ID. Omit when dispatching an existing campaign.

message.example: Call requests received and being processed

get.description: Checks whether the provided x-api-key is valid and returns organization context.

403.description: Authenticated caller does not have access

post.description: Queues one or more outbound calls for a standalone voice agent or an existing campaign.
